name: Beans Rice Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 3 slices of tender red cabbage, diced and sauted in balsamic vinegar
or saute cabbage in apple juice, and add lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash half of the white beans.
2. Mix mashed beans with whole beans, rice, red cabbage, figs, and onion.
3. Add cinnamon.
4. Serve 4 people.
